body: This PR makes `FieldTimeSeries` load the data using the correct architecture when reading from NetCDF files. It also fixes a test that was wrongly set up and wasn't testing what it should.
title: (0.104.3) Make `FieldTimeSeries` respect `architecture` when reading from NetCDF files

body:
The implicit free surface is not guaranteeing local tracer conservation, despite satisfying global tracer conservation. 
This PR reformulates the `ImplicitFreeSurface` to use a transport velocity which matches the evolution of the free surface (the same approach as the `SplitExplicitFreeSurface`) to ensure local conservation

labels.description: Concerning a change which breaks the API
labels.name: breaking change :broken_heart:

title: (0.104.4) Guarantee conservation with an `ImplicitFreeSurface`
Use WENO in the ocean mixing example
